ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for the image */,
  "encoder" TEXT /* Encoder used to compress the image */,
  "compression" REAL /* Compression ratio applied to the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was last updated */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the image (width/height) */,
  "color_mode" TEXT /* Color mode of the image (e.g., RGB, CMYK) */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the image in DPI */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the image is private (1) or public (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number or identifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file for the specific version */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the image for the specific version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is active (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry (e.g., caption, tags) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, consumer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the access entry belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access entry belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the access entry */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access entry expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "replied_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment this comment is a reply to (if applicable) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is deleted (1) or not (0) */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who deleted the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_replied_to FOREIGN KEY ("replied_to") REFERENCES image_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag or keyword */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tag is deleted (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_tags_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the category belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or classification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the category */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is deleted (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_categories_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_similarities" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the similarity entry belongs to */,
  "similar_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar image */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two images */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the similarity entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the similarity entry */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the similarity entry is deleted (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_similarities_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_similarities_similar_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the processing entry belongs to */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing (e.g., resizing, compression) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the processing entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the processing entry */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the processing was completed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the processing failed */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the processing entry is deleted (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
